subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath drawn nigh unto the horizon of utterance and hath believed in God, the Single, the All-Knowing. We make mention of all who have turned unto Our countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تقرب الی افق البیان و آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر انا نذکر کل من توجه الی وجه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
